title: SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST BEAVERTON SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides low-cost immigration counseling. Staff members are trained in immigration law and are accredited by the US Immigration and Naturalization Service Board of Immigration Appeals. 3800 SW Cedar Hills Boulevard Suite 288 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2:30pm Email (503) 924-2488 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 924-2488 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for consultation appointment. Consultation does not guarantee acceptance of the case. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Services: Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MULTICULTURAL COUNSELING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
